description: A private, context-efficient MCP server for Google Tasks.
name: io.github.ebmurha/google-tasks-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client ID from the user's Google Cloud project.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth client secret from the user's Google Cloud project.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth callback URL for the user's local or hosted server.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Persistent SQLite database path for tokens and cache.
environmentVariables.name: DB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional default tasklist title or ID.
environmentVariables.name: DEFAULT_TASKLIST

title: Google Tasks MCP Server
